text: Implement DynamicBufferManager for optimized VBO updates

status.comment: Implemented and verified a concrete end-to-end slice for DynamicBufferManager via focused unit coverage in packages/frontend/src/webgl/buffers/DynamicBufferManager.test.ts. Added tests for first-frame full upload, partial updates below threshold, full-update fallback above threshold, animation ping-pong buffer swap behavior, and mode transition cleanup. Verification: `npm run test:unit -w frontend -- src/webgl/buffers/DynamicBufferManager.test.ts` passed (5/5). Note: full frontend `npm run type-check -w frontend` currently fails on many unrelated pre-existing issues outside this aim scope.
